instruction: Give me a complete Dimir Tempo decklist for Legacy.
output: Main Deck (60 cards): 4 Brainstorm, 4 Ponder, 4 Force of Will, 4 Daze, 3 Thoughtseize, 3 Fatal Push, 2 Spell Pierce, 1 Snuff Out, 4 Tamiyo Inquisitive Student, 4 Orcish Bowmasters, 3 Murktide Regent, 4 Barrowgoyf, 4 Polluted Delta, 3 Misty Rainforest, 2 Scalding Tarn, 4 Underground Sea, 1 Watery Grave, 4 Wasteland, 1 Island, 1 Swamp. (Total: 4+4+4+4+3+3+2+1+4+4+3+4+4+3+2+4+1+4+1+1 = 60) Sideboard (15 cards): 2 Surgical Extraction, 2 Hydroblast, 1 Force of Negation, 1 Dismember, 1 Sheoldred's Edict, 2 Plague Engineer, 1 Subtlety, 1 Stern Scolding, 1 Nihil Spellbomb, 2 Flusterstorm, 1 Massacre. (Total: 2+2+1+1+1+2+1+1+1+2+1 = 15)
